name: Double Decker Brownies Using Basic Cookie Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Make one recipe of brownies from basic cookie mix.
2. Bake for 25 minutes. Remove from oven.
3. Evenly sprinkle miniature marshmallows over the brownies.
4. Return to oven and bake an additional 5 minutes.
5. Remove from oven; cool in pan.
6. In a double boiler, combine peanut butter chips and shortening.
7. Melt mixture over hot, not boiling water.
8. Add rice cereal; stir until thoroughly coated.
9. Spread over top of marshmallows.
10. Cool until set. Cut into squares. Makes 16 servings.
